noticias.titulo: Heron Bay Doubles Down on Vontier, Buying 1.37 Million Shares
noticias.resumen: Vontier provides technology and services for global mobility infrastructure, supporting fueling, fleet, and diagnostics markets worldwide.

noticias.titulo: Why Perella Weinberg (PWP) Shares Are Sliding Today
noticias.resumen: Shares of financial advisory firm Perella Weinberg Partners (NASDAQ:PWP) fell 4.6% in the afternoon session after April CPI came in hot at 3.8% year-over-year, lifting the 10-year Treasury yield to 4.43%, a mixed signal for investment banks.

noticias.titulo: Ares Capital's Dividend Looks Tempting. Here's What Investors Need to Check Now
noticias.resumen: Ares Capital has a 10% yield, which is way higher than the S&P 500's 1.1%; is it safe?
